paragraphs.summary: This supervisory statement (SS) sets out the approach of the Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) in respect of the identification of recognised exchanges prior to the adoption by the European Commis
This SS supplements SS17/13 and is aimed at firms to which CRD IV2 applies.

sections.chapter_title: Exposures to entities in third countries eligible for particular credit risk treatments during 2014

paragraphs.summary: Update 23 January 2015. The part of SS20/13 dealing with third country equivalence aspects of the credit risk provisions in the CRR is no longer applicable with effect from 1 January 2015, and has bee

The CRR defines the term ‘recognised exchange’. This term is used in: the part of the CRR definitions of ‘repurchase agreement’ and ‘repurchase agreement’; the criteria for determining own funds requi
